heading_content_part: Privacy Policy

XINHUA NEWS APP PRIVACY NOTICEThank you for using Xinhua News App (collectively "App" or â€œwe,â€ â€œus,â€ or â€œourâ€), which is owned and operated by		Xinhua		New Media Culture Communication Co., Ltd, a subsidiary of Xinhua News Agency. Your privacy is very important to us.		To		better protect your privacy, we are providing this notice explaining our privacy policy (this Policy), which		describes		how we collect, use, share, disclose and process your personal data through your use of Xinhua News App.

INFORMATION WE GATHERThrough Xinhua News App, you can engage in various activities like reading news stories, publishing your opinions,		joining votes, entering contests, and taking part in quizzes. Your personally identifiable information may be		collected		to engage in these activities.

decoder_heading: WHAT TYPES OF DATA WE COLLECT?
ident_heading: WHAT TYPES OF DATA WE COLLECT?
heading_content_part: WHAT TYPES OF DATA WE COLLECT?We collect the following types of data:

Login InformationWe collect your profile photo and user ID when you log into our Service with your Facebook,Twitter or WeChat		account.		Profile photo in Facebook Twitter or WeChat will be the profile photo of your account in our Service with your		consent.		You will not be required to log in or upload any profile photo or have a user ID if you merely use the basic		functions		in our Service, such as browsing and searching.

To provide the sharing function, our product integrates Ushare SDK. The SDK will collect the identifiable		information of		your device and the public information of your social account you need to share.

User's behavior informationWe collect your behaviors information when you use our Service, such as browsing history, search history, comments,		collections, likes etc.We collect usage data such as how you use our application, what news you have read and when.If you are using the Augmented Reality/Virtual Reality (AR/VR) functionality of our application, while biometric		data		can be created by picture or video of your visage, we do not collect such data.Other Information
Identity data such as your gender, age.Location data such as the city where you are located, the country you reside in.Technical data such as your IP address, the device you are using.

Device information includes device systems,		device		manufacturers, device brands, unique device identifier.OUR LEGITIMAT GROUPS FOR USING PERSONAL INFORMATIONYour consentYour consent will be necessary in some circumstances under which you will have the right to withdraw that consent		at any		time, however, if the consent is withdrawn, we may not be able to continue to provide the service you requested.Fulfilling a contract

We also process your personal information in order to fulfil a contract we have with you. For example, we would use		your information to provide you with access to our Service.Legitimate interestsWe may use your information where there are legitimate interests to do so. For example, we will analyze your		reading		habits and preferences to recommend more news to you according to your interests, making our Services more		user-friendly.

We only rely on legitimate interests if the reason for using your information is fair and lawful. Where we want to		rely		on legitimate interests as a legal basis, we will carry out a balancing test between our legitimate interests and		your		privacy rights. Our legitimate interests in processing personal information include:to set up and administer your account, verify your identity, and send important account, subscription and			service			information

to deliver and suggest personalized content such as news. We analyze the way you use our Services to make			suggestions			to you on content or services that we believe you will also be interested in, and to make our Services more			user-friendlyfor internal research and development purposes and to improve, test and enhance the features and functions of			our			Servicesto provide you with marketing within the scope permitted by law

to meet our internal and external audit requirements, including our information security obligationsto protect our rights, privacy, safety, networks, systems and property, or those of other personsfor the prevention, detection or investigation of a crime or other breach of law or requirement, loss prevention			or			fraudCompliance with legal obligationsThere may be situations where we need to use your information to comply with legal and regulatory obligations or		defend		claims.
You are welcome to contact us for fu

rther information on the legal grounds that we rely on in relation to any		specific		processing of your personal information.HOW WE USE YOUR DATA AND WHY WE NEED IT?We process your personal data in accordance with the legal basis under the General Data Protection Regulation		(GDPR) of		the European Union and the Cybersecurity Law (CSL) of the Peopleâ€™s Republic of China.The purposes of our collection and use of the personal data are specified as follows:To recommend customized news

We will use information about your behavior to make feature tags. Based on such feature tags, we will conduct the		portrait for a crowd of users to recommend customized news.To provide personalized serviceWe will use your device information to provide you with better products or services and personalized information		display		service.TYPES OF PERSONAL DATA AND PURPOSESType of Personal DataPurpose1Login InformationProfile photo in Facebook Twitter or WeChat will be the profile photo of your account.

To provide sharing function.2User's behavior informationTo recommend customized news3Device InformationTo provide push service and sharing functionHOW WE STORE YOUR PERSONAL DATA1. Location of information storageWe will store your personal data collected and generated in the course of operation within the territory of the		People's		Republic of China in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.2. Period of information storage

We will store your data for a period necessary for the purposes set out in this Policy, or when we have a		legitimate		reason for doing so. If you ask us to delete your information before the end of the period, we may not be able to do		so		due to technical, legal, regulatory or contractual constraints.If you wish to close your account, we will do this as soon as reasonably possible subject to any applicable terms		and		conditions.HOW WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL DATA
We will not share your personal data with other companies, organizations or individuals other than the service		provider of the App, except under following circumstances:1. Sharing with

your consentWe may share your personal data with other companies, organizations or individuals with your explicit consent.2. Sharing required by lawWe may share your personal data with other companies, organizations or individuals required by laws and		regulations,		resolving disputes, or responding to requests from administrative or judicial authorities.3. Sharing with third-party providersWe may share your personal data with third-party providers. For example, your personal data will be shared with		the

livestreaming service providers when you use livestreaming service.The third-party providers with whom your data would be shared are as follows:		Service providers: we engage service providers to support our business and improve our Service. These service		providers		include: the providers for delivery of our digital content and marketing; the provider of livestreaming service;		business partners with whom we deliver co-branded services, provide content, or to host events, conferences and

seminars; third parties that help us deliver services or act on our behalf.SDK: To provide you with one-click sharing service,		our app has integrate a Ushare SDK supported by Umeng+		which will collect your device identifiable information		(such as IMEI/Android ID IDFA,etc.) and the public information of your social account.		For your information security, we have made data security confidentiality agreements with Umeng+,		who will strictly abide by our data privacy and security requirements.

We will not share your personal identifiable information unless authorized by you. For more information,		please log on tohttps://www.umeng.com/policyto learn about the privacy policy of Umeng+.To track and collect bugs, our app has integrate a Tencent Bugly SDK which will report errors with your identifiable information (such as IMEI/Android ID IDFA,etc.) tohttps://android.bugly.qq.comWe will not share your personal identifiable information unless authorized by you.

For more information , please log on tohttps://bugly.qq.com/docs/user-guide/instruction-manual-android/?v=1.0.04. Sharing with joint-controllerWe may share your personal data to joint controllers, who can also determine the purposes and means of the		processing of		personal data, such as the advertisers, etc.We will only share your personal data out of legal, proper, necessary, specific and explicit purposes, and we		will only

share necessary information needed to our services. Our partners have no rights to use shared information for		purposes		irrelevant to their products and services. Any information that you provide on or to a third-party website or		service is		provided directly to the owner of the service and is subject to that party's Privacy Policy. Our Privacy Policy		does not		apply to such services and we're not responsible for the content, privacy or security practices and policies of		those

services. To protect your information, we recommend that you carefully review the privacy policies of other		services		that you access.CROSS-BORDER DATA TRANSFERSince our Service is global by nature, it may be necessary for us to transfer your information to our affiliates		or		third parties with whom we have a cooperative relationship for our legitimate business purposes, and such		information		may be maintained on computers and/or other servers located outside of your state, province, country or other

governmental jurisdiction in whole or in part where the privacy laws and technology level may not be the same as		those		in your jurisdiction.Please note that the laws vary by jurisdiction, so the privacy laws applicable to the places where your		information is		transferred or stored, used, or processed, may be different from the privacy laws of the jurisdiction you reside		in.The collected information may be stored in the People's Republic of China. By choosing to visit the Service or		provide

information to us, you agree that any dispute over privacy or the terms contained in this Privacy Policy will be		governed by the laws of China and the adjudication of any disputes arising in connection with us or our Service		will be		in accordance with the Terms of Use on the App. When we transfer your information globally, we guarantee that your		information will be transferred securely and lawfully. We have taken appropriate safeguards to ensure that your		personal

information will be protected in accordance with this Policy and we hereby ensure that any third party acting as		our		agent would do the same.Users should direct any questions, concerns or complaints regarding the processing of personal information at:		XinhuaNews_Support@xhsxmt.com. We will duly handle your questions. However, please note that our Service may not		be		available to you if you reject international information transfer.DATA SECURITY

We have adopted proper security measures in compliance with industry standards to protect the privacy and		security of		your personal data, to prevent personal data from being accessed without permission, disclosed, used, edited,		damaged or		lost. For example, we use Security Sockets Layer (SSL) to secure information transfers between your browsers and		servers; we use HTTPS when you browse the App; we use encryption technologies to improve security of personal		data; we

use reliable protection systems to prevent attacks; we deploy an access control system to ensure that only		authorized		person can access to personal data; and we will train our employees on privacy protection as well as how to handle		and		manage your data appropriately.If your personal data breaches, we will inform you according to relevant laws and regulations of the basic		situation,		possible influence, our remedial solutions taken or will be taken, and offer self-protection or self-prevention

suggestions to you and make necessary remedial measures. We will communicate with you by e-mail, mail, phone calls		and/or alerts. If we cannot reach to all affected individuals, we will publish announcements in proper and		effective		ways.YOUR RIGHTSYou have the rights under applicable laws to have access to your personal data and to ask us to rectify, erase		and		restrict the use of your personal data. You also have the rights to object to your personal data being used, to		ask for

the transfer of personal data you have made available to us and to withdraw consent to the use of your personal		data.		You may find further information on how to exercise your rights set out underneath.We honor your rights under applicable data protection laws. You have following rights under laws of the People's		Republic of China, and may have similar rights under the laws of other countries.1. Right to access

You have the right to make a written request for details of your personal data and a copy of that personal data.2. Right to rectificationYou have the right to have inaccurate information about you corrected or removed.3. Right to erasureYou have the right to have certain personal data about you erased.4. Right to restriction of processingYou have the right to request that your personal data would only be used for restricted purposes.5. Right to object

You have the right to object to our processing of your personal data based on the performance of a task carried		out in		the public interest or we have let you know the processing is necessary for our or a third party's

legitimate		interests.6. Right to data portabilityYou have the right to ask for the personal data you have made available to us to be transferred to you or a third		party		in machine-readable format.7. Right to withdraw consentYou have the right to withdraw any consent you previously gave us. If you withdraw your consent, this will not		affect		the lawfulness of our use of your personal data prior to the withdrawal of your consent.8. Right to compliantYou may make a complaint to the supervisory authority.

These rights are not absolute and they do not always apply in all cases.In response to a request, we will ask you to verify your identity if we need to, and to provide information that		helps		us to understand your request better. If we do not comply with your request, whether in whole or in part, we will		explain why.To exercises any of these rights please contact us at XinhuaNews_Support@xhsxmt.com with details of your request.		If you

have any questions about these rights, you may also contact us at the above e-mail.UPDATES TO THIS POLICYOur Privacy Policy may be amended from time to time. Any such changes will be posted on our main Privacy Policy		page. If		we make a significant or material change in the way we u

se your personal data, the change will be posted thirty		(30)		days prior to taking effect and registered users will be notified via e-mail. We employ measures designed to		protect the		security of your personal identifying information.

HOW TO CONTACT USFor any questions or comments regarding our information or security practices, you may contact us by e-mail at		XinhuaNews_Support@xhsxmt.com or by mail to Xinhua News App, New Media Center, Xinhua News Agency, 57 Xuanwumen		Xidajie,		Beijing, 100803
